english_title: Thou hast made me endless, such is thy pleasure
When thou commandest me to sing it seems that
I know not how thou singest, my master!
bengali_title: তুমি কেমন করে গান কর যে গুণী

english_title: Life of my life, I shall ever try
I ask for a moment's indulgence to sit by thy side
bengali_title: তুমি একটু কেবল বসতে দিয়ো কাছে

english_title: Pluck this little flower and take it, delay not !
My song has put off her adornments
The child who is decked with prince's robes
bengali_title: রাজার মত বেশে তুমি সাজাও যে শিশুরে

english_title: O fool, to try to carry thyself upon thy own shoulders!
Here is thy footstool and there rest my feet
Leave this chanting and singing and telling of beads!
The time that my journey lakes is long
The song that I came to sing remains unsung
bengali_title: হেথা যে গান গাইতে আসা আমার

english_title: My desires are many and my cry is pitiful
I am here to sing thee songs. In this hall of thine
I have had my invitation to this world's festival
I am only waiting for love
Clouds heap upon clouds and it darkens
If thou speakest not I will fill my heart
On the day when the lotus bloomed alas
bengali_title: যেদিন ফুটল কমল কিছুই জানি নাই

english_title: I must launch out my boat
In the deep shadows of the rainy July
Art thou abroad on this stormy night on thy journey
If the day is done
bengali_title: দিবস যদি সাঙ্গ হল, না যদি গাহে পাখি

english_title: In the night of weariness let me give myself up
bengali_title: মাঝে মাঝে কভু যদি অবসাদ আসি

english_title: He came and sat by my side
Light, oh where is light ?
Obstinate are the trammels
bengali_title: জড়ায়ে আছে বাধা, ছাড়ায়ে যেতে চাই

english_title: He whom I enclose with my name
bengali_title: আমার নামটা দিয়ে ঢেকে রাখি যারে

english_title: I came out alone on my way to my tryst
"Prisoner, tell me, who was it that bound you?"
By all means they try to hold me secure
When it was day they came into my house
Let only that little be left of me
Where the mind is without fear
This is my prayer to thee, my lord
bengali_title: তব কাছে এই মোর শেষ নিবেদন

english_title: Thought that my voyage had come to its end
bengali_title: ভেবেছিনু মনে যা হবার তারি শেষে

english_title: That I want thee, only thee
When the heart is hard and perched up
The rain has held back for days and days
Where dost thou stand behind them all
bengali_title: কোথা ছায়ার কোনে দাঁড়িয়ে তুমি কিসের প্রতীক্ষায়

english_title: Early in the day in was whispered that
bengali_title: কথা ছিল এক-তরীতে কেবল তুমি আমি

english_title: The day was when I did not keep myself
bengali_title: তখন করি নি নাথ, কোন আয়োজন

english_title: This is my delight, thus to wait and watch
Have you not heard his silent steps?
bengali_title: তোরা শুনিস নি কি শুনিস নি তার

english_title: I know not from what distant time thou
The night is nearly spent waiting for him in vain
The morning sea of silence broke into ripples
You came down from your throne
I had gone a-begging from door to door
The night darkened
I thought that I should ask thee
Beautiful is thy wristlet, decked with stars
I asked nothig from thee
Langour is upon your heart and the slumber
bengali_title: এখনো ঘোর ভাঙে না তোর যে

english_title: Thus it is that thy joy in me is so full
Light, my light, the world-filling light
Let all the strains of my joy
bengali_title: যেন শেষ গানে মোর সব রাগিণী পূরে

english_title: Yes, I know, this is nothing but thy love
On the seashore of endless worlds children meet
The sleep that flits on baby's eyes
bengali_title: খোকার চোখে যে ঘুম আসে সকল তাপনাশা

english_title: When I bring to you coloured toys, my child
bengali_title: রঙিন খেলেনা দিলে ও রাঙা হাতে

english_title: Thou hast made me known to friends
On the slope of the desolate river among
What divine drink wouldst thou have, my God
bengali_title: হে মোর দেবতা, ভরিয়া এ দেহ প্রাণ

english_title: She who ever have remained in the depth
Thou art the sky and thou art the nest as well
Thy sunbeam comes upon this earth of mine
The same stream of life that runs
Is it beyond thee to be glad with
bengali_title: পারবি না কি যোগ দিতে এই ছন্দে রে

english_title: That I should make much of myself
He it is, the innermost one
Deliverance is not for me in renunciation
bengali_title: বৈরাগ্য সাধনে মুক্তি, সে আমার নয়

english_title: The day is no more, the shadow is upon the earth
bengali_title: আর নাই রে বেলা নামল ছায়া

english_title: Thy gift to us mortals fulfill all our needs
Day after day, O lord of my life
I know thee as my God and stand apart
When the creation was new
If it is not my portion to meet thee
bengali_title: যদি তোমার দেখা না পাই, প্রভু

english_title: I am like a remnant of a cloud of autumn
On many an idle day have I grieved
Time is endless in thy hands
bengali_title: হে রাজেন্দ্র, তব হাতে কাল অন্তহীন

english_title: Mother, I shall weave a chain of pearls
It is the pang of separation that spreads
When the warriors came out first
Death, thy servant, is at my door
In desperate hope I go and search for her
bengali_title: আমার ঘরেতে আর নাই সে-যে নাই

english_title: Deity of the ruined temple!
No more noisy, loud words from me
On the day when death will knock at thy door
O thou the last fulfilment of life, death
I know that the day will come when
bengali_title: একদিন এই দেখা হয়ে যাবে শেষ

english_title: I have got my leave
At this time of my parting
I was not aware of the moment when
When I go from hence let this be my parting word
When my play was with thee
bengali_title: আমার খেলা যখন ছিল তোমার সনে

english_title: I will deck thee with trophies
When I give up the helm
I dive down into the depth of the ocean of forms
Ever in my life have I sought thee with my songs
bengali_title: আমি গান দিয়ে যে তোমায় খুঁজি

english_title: I boasted among men that I had known you
bengali_title: তোমায় চিনি বলে আমি করেছি গরব

english_title: In one salutation to thee, my God
